SEARCH
Package com.blackaby.Backend.Emulation.Memory

Class CartridgeController

java.lang.Object
com.blackaby.Backend.Emulation.Memory.CartridgeController
public abstract class CartridgeController extends Object
Base class for cartridge mapper implementations.

A controller is responsible for mapping CPU reads and writes in cartridge address space to the correct ROM bank, external RAM bank, and mapper control registers.

  • Constructor Details

    • CartridgeController

      protected CartridgeController(ROM rom, int ramSizeBytes)
      Creates a controller backed by the supplied cartridge image.
      Parameters:
      rom - cartridge image and header metadata
      ramSizeBytes - amount of external RAM exposed by the cartridge

  • Method Details

    • Create

      public static CartridgeController Create(ROM rom)
      Creates the correct mapper controller for a ROM header.
      Parameters:
      rom - cartridge image and header metadata
      Returns:
      mapper controller for the cartridge type

    • ReadRom

      public abstract int ReadRom(int address)
      Reads a byte from cartridge ROM space.
      Parameters:
      address - CPU address in the cartridge ROM range
      Returns:
      mapped ROM byte

    • ReadRam

      public int ReadRam(int address)
      Reads a byte from cartridge external RAM space.
      Parameters:
      address - address offset within the external RAM window
      Returns:
      mapped RAM byte

    • Write

      public abstract void Write(int address, int value)
      Handles a write to cartridge-controlled address space.
      Parameters:
      address - CPU address being written
      value - byte value being written

    • ReadRomBank

      protected int ReadRomBank(int bank, int addressWithinBank)
      Reads a byte from a ROM bank, clamping out-of-range addresses to 0xFF.
      Parameters:
      bank - bank number to read
      addressWithinBank - offset within the selected bank
      Returns:
      ROM byte

    • ReadRamBank

      protected int ReadRamBank(int bank, int addressWithinBank)
      Reads a byte from an external RAM bank.
      Parameters:
      bank - RAM bank number
      addressWithinBank - offset within the selected bank
      Returns:
      RAM byte

    • WriteRamBank

      protected void WriteRamBank(int bank, int addressWithinBank, int value)
      Writes a byte into an external RAM bank.
      Parameters:
      bank - RAM bank number
      addressWithinBank - offset within the selected bank
      value - byte value to store

    • HasRam

      protected boolean HasRam()
      Returns whether the cartridge exposes any external RAM.
      Returns:
      true if RAM exists

    • SupportsSaveData

      public boolean SupportsSaveData()
      Returns whether the cartridge should persist RAM to disk.
      Returns:
      true when save files are supported

    • ExportSaveData

      public byte[] ExportSaveData()
      Returns a raw copy of the cartridge RAM for persistence.
      Returns:
      raw save RAM bytes

    • LoadSaveData

      public void LoadSaveData(byte[] saveData)
      Replaces cartridge RAM from persisted save bytes.
      Parameters:
      saveData - raw save RAM bytes

    • CaptureState

      public CartridgeController.MapperState CaptureState()
      Captures mapper registers and external RAM for quick-state persistence.
      Returns:
      mapper snapshot

    • RestoreState

      public void RestoreState(CartridgeController.MapperState state)
      Restores mapper registers and external RAM from a quick-state snapshot.
      Parameters:
      state - mapper snapshot

    • CaptureRegisters

      protected int[] CaptureRegisters()

    • RestoreRegisters
